overview.description: Semantic AI for e-commerce product discovery, search, and recommendations
overview.description_long: Raventic AI is a Prague-based B2B SaaS startup offering an AI-powered product discovery engine for e-commerce. Their platform combines semantic NLP and visual AI to deliver semantic search, similar product recommendations, complementary (cross-sell) suggestions, and curated merchandising. Integration is no-code (JavaScript plugin) or via API, with automatic retraining and GDPR/EAA compliance built in.
overview.tagline: Semantic AI Discovery — Next-gen solution that transforms how your customers explore, find and buy

history.origin_story: Incorporated in Prague in August 2023 as Raventic AI s.r.o. (ICO: 19662157), targeting the e-commerce product discovery gap with multi-modal semantic AI.

key_milestones.event: Launched full product suite: Semantic Search, Similar Products, Curated Products, Complementary Products, Raventic Analytics
Published case studies with Hanibal (+11% revenue), Bikero (+8.2% revenue), Houseland (+7% revenue)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Core offering (semantic search + AI recommendations for e-commerce) is in a competitive space where foundation models and large incumbents (Algolia, Recombee, Luigi's Box — all mentioned as direct competitors on their own site) are advancing quickly. However, Raventic's multi-modal visual+semantic combination, no-code integration layer, and GDPR-compliant privacy-first architecture provide short-term differentiation.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: E-commerce product discovery is a well-established, large market with proven ROI — Raventic's own case studies show 8–11% revenue increases for Czech retailers. Pricing tiers (€149–€249+/month) suggest real paying customers and clear PMF.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No public funding rounds found. Company was incorporated August 2023 with a nominal capital of CZK 1,000, suggesting bootstrapped operation. Very early stage with limited runway signals — sustainability depends on organic growth of the SaaS customer base.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Real product with paying customers and measurable results reduces market risk. However, the combination of no known external funding, a crowded AI search/recommendation market, and a small team makes this a medium-risk employer for job seekers concerned about stability.

metadata.notes: Company registered as Raventic AI s.r.o., ICO 19662157, court ref C 389855/MSPH (Municipal Court Prague). Domain raventic.ai does not resolve; website is raventic.com. No CNAIP entry found. LinkedIn page exists at /company/raventic-ai but requires authentication. No Glassdoor listing found.
